entities.mentionText:
所有價格為新台幣計價,另加收百分之十服務費。若您有自帶酒水的需求,本餐廳將收取酒水服務費,葡萄酒每瓶$500,烈酒每瓶$1,000。
All All prices are in TWD and subject to 10% service charge. The corkage fee $500 per bottle is vintage wine. And is $1,000 per bottle for
other alcoholic drinks.
